Water over roadways. Vehicle rescue and roads closed in the area of Mines Rd. and 35.
Flooding Due To heavy rainfall.

Flash flooding forced the closure of the Navarro Street underpass Sunday, blocking traffic at the entrances on East North Street, Navarro Street and Goodwin Avenue. City officials said barricades were placed at all entry points to keep drivers out of high water. Crews are monitoring the area and will reopen the intersection once conditions improve. Police say the intersection could remain closed until tomorrow.
Social media video from Facebook showed a Chevrolet pickup truck driving through several inches of standing water at the intersection of Baldwin Blvd and Osage St.
